name: Wirken: per-agent budget exceeded
message:
A Wirken agent reached its per-agent spend ceiling for the current budget window.

Detection: budget_exceeded (10)
Severity baseline: medium

`@wirken.event.action` is `blocked` (the LLM call was refused, an enforced stop) or `alerted` (the ceiling was crossed and the call proceeded). Pivot on @wirken.event.agent_id, @wirken.event.window, @wirken.event.window_spend_usd_micros, @wirken.event.ceiling_usd_micros.

Emitted by the wirken runtime's pre-call budget gate. Requires audit schema 1.12.0 (the budget_exceeded event) and the default budget_exceeded forwarding.

@security-team
